config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: The interval to re-draw the screen. Defaults to `5s`.

config_entries.label: Model
config_entries.description: Specify the model. Defaults to `inkplate_6`.

config_entries.label: Ckv Pin
config_entries.description: The CKV pin for the Inkplate display.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Lambda
config_entries.description:
**Set at most one of:** `pages`, `lambda`.

The lambda to use for rendering the content on the display. See [Display Rendering Engine](https://esphome.io/components/display#display-engine) for more information.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.

config_entries.label: Auto Clear Enabled
config_entries.description: If the display should be cleared before each update. Defaults to `true` if a lambda or pages are configured, false otherwise.

config_entries.label: Custom Waveform
config_entries.description: Sets a custom predefined waveform for the display. Accepts values from 1 to 4. Useful if the greyscale of the image seems washed. **Inkplate10 ONLY**. Defaults to `0`

config_entries.label: Full Update Every
config_entries.description: When partial updating is enabled, forces a full screen update after chosen number of updates. Defaults to `10`

config_entries.label: Greyscale
config_entries.description: Makes the screen display 3 bit colors. Defaults to `false`

config_entries.label: Partial Updating
config_entries.description: Makes the screen update partially, which is faster, but leaves burnin. Defaults to `false`

config_entries.label: Rotation
config_entries.description: Set the rotation of the display. Everything you draw in `lambda:` will be rotated by this option. One of `0°` (default), `90°`, `180°`, `270°`.

config_entries.label: Transform
config_entries.description: Transform the display presentation.
